title: Lead Instructional Designer at EduComp Solutions

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at EduComp Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Join the EduComp Solutions family as a Instructional Designer in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About EduComp Solutions:
EduComp Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EduComp Solutions!
